Document:
[mono][color=#897236]╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗[/color]\n[color=#897236]║ [/color][color=#ffd688]TDF // OFFICIAL DOCUMENTS[/color][color=#897236] Triad Security Forces ║[/color]\n[color=#897236]║ SOP ║[/color]\n[color=#897236]╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝[/color][/mono]
[head=2][color=#897236]──────═════ [head=1]◊[/head] ═════──────[/color][/head]
[color=#897236][mono]──── [color=#FFA500][bold]STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE[/bold][/color] ───────────────────────────────[/mono][/color]
This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) is designed for Triad Defence Force (Referred to as TDF for the remainder of this document) Enforcers and Security forces operating within the Triad sector. In this region struggling to rebuild, the goal is to maintain order without inciting a full scale riot, while remaining lethal enough to deter organized piracy and the spread of illicit/unauthorized cargo.
[color=#897236][mono]──── [color=#FFA500][bold]DEFINITIONS[/bold][/color] ───────────────────────────────[/mono][/color]
Below are the definitons used in SOP as well as Triad Sector legal code: - [textlink="Definitions" link="SLDefinitions"]
[color=#897236][mono]──── [color=#FFA500][bold]PAGES[/bold][/color] ───────────────────────────────[/mono][/color] - [textlink="I. Jurisdictional Authority" link="SOPJurisdictionalAuthority"] - [textlink="II. Smuggling" link="SOPSmuggling"] - [textlink="III. Belligerent Vessel's Aggression & Naval Engagements" link="SOPNavalEngagements"] - [textlink="IV. Post-Arrest Procedure" link="SOPPostArrestProcedure"] - [textlink="V. Chain of Command" link="SOPChainOfCommand"] - [textlink="VI. Command Authority and Privileges" link="SOPCommandAuthority"]
[head=2][color=#897236]──────═════ [head=1]◊[/head] ═════──────[/color][/head]
